title: Invisible-GUI-texturepack
description: The standard Minecraft textures, but with a invisible theme.
body:
💎 Invinsible-GUI-texturepack 💎

--> Make your Minecraft look cleaner than ever with a nearly invisible / transparent GUI!
This texture pack is perfect for players who want a minimalistic and modern look while keeping full visibility during gameplay. 

👀 Features 👀
- Transparent / nearly invisible GUI
- Clean and minimal design
- Perfect for PvP, Survival, Bedwars & more
- Better visibility while playing
- Smooth and comfortable gameplay
- Modern colors and clean style
- Regular updates planned

This pack was made to give Minecraft a cleaner and more enjoyable feeling without changing the normal vibe of the game.

--> Perfect for players who love a simple, transparent and clean Minecraft experience.

🤩 See the gallery for examples 🤩
